[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 01001000 2
4 11001010 4
5 10001010 3
6 00110001 3
7 01110111 6

01 11111111 a
12 11001110 5
23 10111001 5
34 11111111 a
45 10111100 5
56 11010111 6
67 11111011 7
70 01111101 6

02 11001110 5
13 10001010 3 match 5
24 11111011 7
35 11111111 a
46 10010111 5
57 11110011 6
60 01111101 6
71 01111101 6

72 11001110 5
